200.description: Register the COMMENT webhook on TikTok Business API
Register the DIRECT_MESSAGE webhook on TikTok Business API
Delete the COMMENT, DIRECT_MESSAGE webhooks from TikTok Business API

post.summary: Queue a WhatsApp catalogue → Commerce Manager migration

get.summary: Latest in-flight migration for an org (for resuming the wizard)
Last completed sync (number + date) for a catalogue, for the banner
Status + live queue position of a migration

post.summary: Report extraction progress (called by the page script per product)
Re-host a product image on our storage (called by the page script)
Persist the extracted catalogue as a temporary JSON on Minio

info.title: Bedones Agents API
info.description: API backend pour le CRM social Bedones

isNewUser.description: True if the user was just created on this verification

catalogPending.description: True when the organisation has no catalog yet.

pendingCount.description: Sum of all pending steps across categories.

disabled.description: Whether outbound calls are disabled after repeated errors or missing scopes

disabledReason.description: Why the account/feature was disabled (e.g. too_many_errors, missing_scopes:...)

isActive.description: Whether the agent would currently reply to this post's comments

technical.description: Raw provider error payload, for "show details"

message.description: Human-friendly explanation keyed by language (e.g. { en, fr })

catalogId.description: Catalog associated to this page (null to unlink)

wabaId.description: WABA ID from Embedded Signup session info

phoneNumberId.description: Phone Number ID from Embedded Signup session info

metadata.description: Interactive payload metadata. For catalog messages: { kind, format, header, body, footer, catalogId, items[{ productRetailerId, name, imageUrl, price, currency }] }. For order messages: { kind: "order", catalogId, text, total, currency, items[{ productRetailerId, name, imageUrl, quantity, itemPrice, currency }] }.

mediaUrl.description: Public URL of the media file to send

replyToId.description: ID of the message to reply to

tiktokMessageType.description: TikTok message type. When omitted, the backend infers TEXT, IMAGE, SHARE_POST, TEMPLATE or SENDER_ACTION from the provided fields.

tiktokSharePostId.description: TikTok post item_id for SHARE_POST messages

tiktokTemplate.description: TikTok Q&A template payload. Supports type QA_BUTTON_CARD or QA_LINK_CARD with 1-3 REPLY buttons.

tiktokSenderAction.description: TikTok sender action for SENDER_ACTION messages

productRetailerIds.description: Retailer IDs of products to send. Ignored when format is "catalog_message" except for thumbnail (first ID).

catalogId.description: Meta catalog ID linked to the WhatsApp number

format.description: Message format: "product" (single, loops if multiple IDs), "product_list" (sectioned list), "carousel" (swipeable cards), "catalog_message" (catalog CTA)

headerText.description: Header text. Supported by "product_list" (required, max 60 chars). Not supported by "product", "carousel" or "catalog_message" per Meta spec.

bodyText.description: Body text accompanying the products (max 1024 chars)

footerText.description: Footer text (max 60 chars). Supported by "product", "product_list" and "catalog_message". Not supported by "carousel".

messageId.description: ID of the message to react to

emoji.description: Emoji to react with. Pass an empty string to remove the current reaction.

isActive.description: Whether the agent would process a new message on this conversation

content.description: Everything the AI knows about this customer — one durable fact per line.
The edited customer knowledge — one durable fact per line. An empty value clears it.

definition.description: Définition du template (éléments, etc.) en JSON.

sourceKey.description: Id du template statique d'origine (absent si créé de zéro).

prompt.description: User natural-language prompt describing the change to apply.

content.description: Final context content to persist on each selected entity.

applyToSiblings.description: When true, also update every product sharing the previous identical content.

postIds.description: Provider post IDs (FB post / IG media) to link.

organisationId.description: Organisation owning the target Commerce Manager catalogue

catalogId.description: Local id of the destination (Commerce Manager) catalogue

sourcePhone.description: WhatsApp number to import the public catalogue from (digits only, no "+")

sourceSocialAccountId.description: Id of the connected SocialAccount the number belongs to, when known

image.description: Image as a data URL (data:image/...;base64,...) or raw base64

retailerIds.description: retailer_ids of the products in this collection

activateAll.description: Respond on every conversation. Exclusive: overrides the other scopes.

activateAds.description: Respond when the incoming message originates from an ad (Meta CTWA/referral, TikTok).

activateNewConversations.description: Respond on all new conversations created after activation.

contacts.description: Per-social-account test contacts (socialAccountId → phone numbers or profile names). Mainly used to test the agent on a few contacts.

conversation.description: Full feedback conversation so far (user turns = operator feedback, agent turns = clarifying questions from the supervisor).

mode.description: "complete" → agent context was updated and a success message is returned. "clarify" → a clarifying question must be shown to the operator.

successMessage.description: Success message shown to the operator when mode = "complete".

question.description: Clarifying question shown to the operator when mode = "clarify".

newContext.description: The updated agent context (markdown) that was persisted when mode = "complete".

change.description: Variation en pourcentage par rapport à la période précédente

date.description: Date ISO du début du bucket

total.description: Quota total = crédits du forfait + crédits achetés

monthlyCredits.description: Crédits de base inclus par le forfait chaque mois

periodStart.description: Date ISO du début de la période de facturation (mois en cours)

periodEnd.description: Date ISO de la fin de la période de facturation

minOrderAmount.description: Minimum order amount (FCFA) to be eligible

minItemCount.description: Minimum number of articles in the order to be eligible

minOrderAmount.description: Minimum order amount (FCFA) to be eligible

minItemCount.description: Minimum number of articles in the order to be eligible

type.description: Type de moyen de paiement, ou null si aucun

status.description: Statut de l'abonnement, ou null si aucun abonnement (forfait gratuit)

monthlyCredits.description: Crédits de base inclus par le forfait chaque mois

purchasedCredits.description: Solde de crédits supplémentaires achetés (non encore consommés)

totalCredits.description: Quota total disponible = crédits du forfait + crédits achetés

currentPeriodEnd.description: Fin de la période en cours (ISO), si abonnement

cancelAtPeriodEnd.description: Annulation programmée en fin de période

hasPayments.description: True si l'org a au moins un paiement enregistré → la page affiche le récap plutôt que le tutoriel/pricing

billingMonths.description: Cadence de facturation en mois (1, 6 ou 12). 6 et 12 appliquent une remise.

method.description: Méthode de paiement. CARD = Stripe (récurrent), MOBILE_MONEY = NotchPay.

url.description: URL de paiement (Stripe Checkout ou NotchPay) vers laquelle rediriger

credits.description: Nombre de crédits à acheter. Doit être un multiple de 1000.

method.description: Méthode de paiement. CARD = Stripe, MOBILE_MONEY = NotchPay.

url.description: URL du portail de facturation Stripe

response.description: Réponses du WhatsApp Flow (response_json parsé : flow_token + champs du formulaire)

userIds.description: Organisation members user IDs to apply the change to

collectionIds.description: Ticket notifications only: restrict to these product collection ids. Empty/omitted = all collections.

userIds.description: Organisation members user IDs to apply the change to

ticketStatusId.description: Ticket status the notification is attached to

collectionIds.description: Restrict to these product collection ids. Empty/omitted = all collections.
